mapper.select: SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(DATA_DT, '(.{4})(.+)(.{2})', '\1-\2-\3') AS DATA_DT, PROCS_ID, NVL(TO_CHAR(ACC, 'FM999,999,999,999,990.0'), '-') AS ACC, NVL(TO_CHAR(MAX, 'FM999,999,999,999,990.0'), '-') AS MAX FROM ( SELECT P.DATA_DT, P.PROCS_ID , S.ITEM_NM, S.LAST_VALUE FROM ( SELECT #{date} AS DATA_DT, P.PROCS_ID FROM RDIPROCSINFO_TB P ) P LEFT JOIN RDDSTAT01DD_TB S ON P.DATA_DT = S.DATA_SAVE_DT AND P.PROCS_ID = S.PROCS_ID AND S.ITEM_NM IN ('ELEC_ACC_DAY', 'ELEC_MAX_DAY') ) PIVOT ( SUM(LAST_VALUE) FOR ITEM_NM IN ('ELEC_ACC_DAY' AS ACC, 'ELEC_MAX_DAY' AS MAX) ) ORDER BY PROCS_ID

WITH UP_TBL AS ( SELECT S.*, P.APLCN_UNTPRC FROM ( SELECT CRTR_YR, APLCN_PTM_CD, HH, DATA_SE_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM RDIPWRERUNITMNG_TB WHERE CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) ) UNPIVOT( DATA_SE_CD FOR HH IN ( DATA_SE_CD_00 AS '00', DATA_SE_CD_01 AS '01', DATA_SE_CD_02 AS '02', DATA_SE_CD_03 AS '03', DATA_SE_CD_04 AS '04', DATA_SE_CD_05 AS '05', DATA_SE_CD_06 AS '06', DATA_SE_CD_07 AS '07', DATA_SE_CD_08 AS '08', DATA_SE_CD_09 AS '09', DATA_SE_CD_10 AS '10', DATA_SE_CD_11 AS '11', DATA_SE_CD_12 AS '12', DATA_SE_CD_13 AS '13', DATA_SE_CD_14 AS '14', DATA_SE_CD_15 AS '15', DATA_SE_CD_16 AS '16', DATA_SE_CD_17 AS '17', DATA_SE_CD_18 AS '18', DATA_SE_CD_19 AS '19', DATA_SE_CD_20 AS '20', DATA_SE_CD_21 AS '21', DATA_SE_CD_22 AS '22', DATA_SE_CD_23 AS '23' ) ) ) S LEFT JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON S.CRTR_YR = P.CRTR_YR AND S.APLCN_PTM_CD = P.APLCN_PTM_CD AND S.DATA_SE_CD = P.DATA_SE_CD ) SELECT PROCS_ID, TO_CHAR(SUM(LAST_VALUE), 'FM999,999,999,990.0') AS USG, TO_CHAR(SUM(TOT_PRC), 'FM999,999,999,990.0') AS PRC FROM ( SELECT PROCS_ID, H.LAST_VALUE, ROUND(H.LAST_VALUE * U.APLCN_UNTPRC, 2) AS TOT_PRC FROM ( SELECT YYYY, CASE WHEN MM IN ('11', '12', '01', '02') THEN 'W' WHEN MM IN ('06', '07', '08') THEN 'S' ELSE 'F' END AS APLCN_PTM_CD, PROCS_ID, MM, DD, HH, LAST_VALUE FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(DATA_SAVE_DT, 1, 4) AS YYYY, SUBSTR(DATA_SAVE_DT, 5, 2) AS MM, SUBSTR(DATA_SAVE_DT, 7, 2) AS DD, SUBSTR(DATA_SAVE_DT, 9, 2) AS HH, PROCS_ID, LAST_VALUE FROM RDFSTAT01HH_TB WHERE ITEM_NM ='PWRER_USG_HH' AND #{date} || '00' <= DATA_SAVE_DT AND DATA_SAVE_DT <= #{date} || '23' ) H ) H LEFT JOIN UP_TBL U ON H.YYYY = U.CRTR_YR AND H.APLCN_PTM_CD = U.APLCN_PTM_CD AND H.HH = U.HH ) GROUP BY PROCS_ID

SELECT T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM, T.TAG_ALIAS, T.TAG_ADD_DC, T.PROCS_ID, R.LOG_TIME, ROUND(R.VAL, 2) AS VAL FROM RDITAG_TB T LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TAGSN, LOG_TIME, VAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TAGSN ORDER BY LOG_TIME DESC) AS RN FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE LOG_TIME LIKE #{date} || '%' ) R ON T.TAGSN = R.TAGSN AND R.RN = 1 WHERE T.TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_ACTI', 'COM_EHV101_2_ACTI', 'COM_EHV401_1_ACTI', 'COM_EHV401_2_ACTI') AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY T.TAGSN

WITH TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGSN, TAG_NM, TAG_ALIAS, TAG_ADD_DC, PROCS_ID FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), CURRENT_VAL AS ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL AS CURRENT_VAL FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - INTERVAL '1' MINUTE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') ), ZERO_HOUR_VAL AS ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL AS ZERO_VAL FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME = #{date} || '0000' ) SELECT T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM, T.TAG_ALIAS, T.TAG_ADD_DC, T.PROCS_ID, NVL(C.CURRENT_VAL, 0) AS CURRENT_VAL, NVL(Z.ZERO_VAL, 0) AS ZERO_VAL, NVL(C.CURRENT_VAL, 0) - NVL(Z.ZERO_VAL, 0) AS TODAY_USAGE FROM TAG_LIST T LEFT JOIN CURRENT_VAL C ON T.TAGSN = C.TAGSN LEFT JOIN ZERO_HOUR_VAL Z ON T.TAGSN = Z.TAGSN ORDER BY T.TAGSN

WITH TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), CURRENT_VAL AS ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL AS CURRENT_VAL FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - INTERVAL '1' MINUTE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') ), ZERO_HOUR_VAL AS ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL AS ZERO_VAL FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME = #{date} || '0000' ) SELECT ROUND(SUM(NVL(C.CURRENT_VAL, 0) - NVL(Z.ZERO_VAL, 0)), 2) AS TOTAL_USAGE FROM TAG_LIST T LEFT JOIN CURRENT_VAL C ON T.TAGSN = C.TAGSN LEFT JOIN ZERO_HOUR_VAL Z ON T.TAGSN = Z.TAGSN

SELECT R.LOG_TIME, SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 9, 2) AS MAX_HOUR, ROUND(R.TOTAL_POWER, 2) AS MAX_POWER FROM ( SELECT LOG_TIME, SUM(VAL) AS TOTAL_POWER, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(VAL) DESC) AS RN FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE T.TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_ACTI', 'COM_EHV101_2_ACTI', 'COM_EHV401_1_ACTI', 'COM_EHV401_2_ACTI') AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' AND R.LOG_TIME LIKE #{date} || '%' GROUP BY LOG_TIME ) R WHERE R.RN = 1

SELECT D.LOG_TIME, SUBSTR(D.LOG_TIME, 1, 10) AS HOUR_KEY, D.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM, T.TAG_ALIAS, T.TAG_ADD_DC, T.PROCS_ID, D.VAL FROM ( SELECT LOG_TIME, TAGSN, VAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TAGSN, SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 10) ORDER BY LOG_TIME DESC) AS RN FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y') AND LOG_TIME >= #{startTime} AND LOG_TIME <= #{endTime} ) D INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON D.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE D.RN = 1 ORDER BY D.LOG_TIME, D.TAGSN

SELECT R.LOG_TIME, R.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM, T.TAG_ALIAS, T.TAG_ADD_DC, T.PROCS_ID, R.VAL FROM RDF01HH_TB R INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE T.TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' AND R.LOG_TIME >= #{startTime} AND R.LOG_TIME <= #{endTime} ORDER BY R.LOG_TIME, R.TAGSN

WITH TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), BASE_VAL AS ( SELECT SUM(VAL) AS BASE_SUM FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST) AND LOG_TIME = #{date} || '0000' ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24')) ), HOURLY_DATA AS ( SELECT #{date} || HR.HH AS HOUR_KEY, ( SELECT SUM(VAL) FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST) AND LOG_TIME = #{date} || HR.HH || '00' ) AS HOUR_SUM FROM HOUR_RANGE HR ) SELECT H.HOUR_KEY, H.HOUR_SUM, B.BASE_SUM, CASE WHEN (NVL(H.HOUR_SUM, 0) - NVL(B.BASE_SUM, 0)) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (NVL(H.HOUR_SUM, 0) - NVL(B.BASE_SUM, 0)) END AS USAGE_KWH, ROUND(CASE WHEN (NVL(H.HOUR_SUM, 0) - NVL(B.BASE_SUM, 0)) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (NVL(H.HOUR_SUM, 0) - NVL(B.BASE_SUM, 0)) END, 4) AS USAGE_MWH FROM HOURLY_DATA H CROSS JOIN BASE_VAL B WHERE H.HOUR_SUM IS NOT NULL ORDER BY H.HOUR_KEY

WITH FACILITY_TAGS AS ( SELECT 'PROCS_1' AS FACILITY_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_AE' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_AE' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM FACILITY_TAGS F INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON F.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL - 1, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24')) + 1 ), HOURLY_DATA AS ( SELECT T.FACILITY_ID, #{date} || HR.HH AS HOUR_KEY, HR.HH, SUM(NVL(R.VAL, 0)) AS HOUR_VAL --(TO_NUMBER(HR.HH) + 1) * 10 AS HOUR_VAL FROM TAG_LIST T CROSS JOIN HOUR_RANGE HR LEFT JOIN RDR01MI_TB R ON T.TAGSN = R.TAGSN AND R.LOG_TIME = #{date} || HR.HH || '00' GROUP BY T.FACILITY_ID, HR.HH ), HOURLY_USAGE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - NVL(LAG(HOUR_VAL, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY FACILITY_ID ORDER BY HOUR_KEY), 0) AS HOUR_USAGE FROM HOURLY_DATA ), UNIT_PRICE AS ( SELECT S.HH, P.APLCN_UNTPRC FROM ( SELECT CRTR_YR, APLCN_PTM_CD, HH, DATA_SE_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM RDIPWRERUNITMNG_TB WHERE CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) ) UNPIVOT( DATA_SE_CD FOR HH IN ( DATA_SE_CD_00 AS '00', DATA_SE_CD_01 AS '01', DATA_SE_CD_02 AS '02', DATA_SE_CD_03 AS '03', DATA_SE_CD_04 AS '04', DATA_SE_CD_05 AS '05', DATA_SE_CD_06 AS '06', DATA_SE_CD_07 AS '07', DATA_SE_CD_08 AS '08', DATA_SE_CD_09 AS '09', DATA_SE_CD_10 AS '10', DATA_SE_CD_11 AS '11', DATA_SE_CD_12 AS '12', DATA_SE_CD_13 AS '13', DATA_SE_CD_14 AS '14', DATA_SE_CD_15 AS '15', DATA_SE_CD_16 AS '16', DATA_SE_CD_17 AS '17', DATA_SE_CD_18 AS '18', DATA_SE_CD_19 AS '19', DATA_SE_CD_20 AS '20', DATA_SE_CD_21 AS '21', DATA_SE_CD_22 AS '22', DATA_SE_CD_23 AS '23' ) ) ) S LEFT JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON S.CRTR_YR = P.CRTR_YR AND S.APLCN_PTM_CD = P.APLCN_PTM_CD AND S.DATA_SE_CD = P.DATA_SE_CD AND P.DATA_CD = '1' WHERE S.APLCN_PTM_CD = #{season} ), BASIC_PRICE AS ( --기본요금 (취수장: DATA_SE_CD=2, 나머지: DATA_SE_CD=1) SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, ( CASE WHEN F.FACILITY_ID = 'PROCS_1' THEN MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 1 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) ELSE MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 2 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) END * MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 3 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) * 12 / 365 / 24 / 6 ) AS PRICE FROM RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB A CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT FACILITY_ID FROM FACILITY_TAGS) F WHERE A.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) AND A.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' GROUP BY F.FACILITY_ID ), SUB_BASIC_PRICE AS( --예비 기본요금 SELECT FACILITY_ID, PRICE * 0.02 AS PRICE FROM BASIC_PRICE ), CLMT_PRICE AS ( --기후환경요금 SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 4 ), FLAD_PRICE AS ( --연료비조정액 SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 5 ), LODF_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.HH, ( CASE WHEN H.HOUR_USAGE > 0 THEN H.HOUR_USAGE * 1000 * NVL(U.APLCN_UNTPRC, 100) ELSE 0 END ) AS PRICE, HOUR_USAGE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN UNIT_PRICE U ON H.HH = U.HH WHERE H.HOUR_KEY > #{date} || '00' ), ELTL_PRICE AS ( --전기요금계 SELECT A.FACILITY_ID, A.HH, NVL(A.PRICE, 0) + NVL(B.PRICE, 0) + NVL(C.PRICE, 0) + NVL(D.PRICE, 0) + NVL(E.PRICE, 0) AS PRICE,
NVL(A.PRICE, 0), NVL(B.PRICE, 0), NVL(C.PRICE, 0), NVL(D.PRICE, 0), NVL(E.PRICE, 0) FROM LODF_PRICE A JOIN BASIC_PRICE B ON A.FACILITY_ID = B.FACILITY_ID JOIN SUB_BASIC_PRICE C ON A.FACILITY_ID = C.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN CLMT_PRICE D ON A.HH = D.HH AND A.FACILITY_ID = D.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN FLAD_PRICE E ON A.HH = E.HH AND A.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID ), TAX_PRICE AS( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HH, PRICE * 0.1 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ), ELFD_PRICE AS( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HH, PRICE * 0.027 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE )
SELECT NVL(E.FACILITY_ID, '합계') AS FACILITY_ID, NVL(R.PROCS_NM, '합계') AS PROCS_NM, SUM(H.HOUR_USAGE) AS USAGE, SUM(NVL(B.PRICE, 0)) AS BASIC_PRICE, '|' AS "-", SUM(NVL(E.PRICE, 0)) AS ELTL_PRICE, SUM(NVL(T.PRICE, 0)) AS TAX_PRICE, SUM(NVL(F.PRICE, 0)) AS ELFD_PRICE, ROUND( SUM( NVL(E.PRICE, 0) + NVL(T.PRICE, 0) + NVL(F.PRICE, 0) ) , 0) AS TOTAL_COST FROM ELTL_PRICE E JOIN BASIC_PRICE B ON E.FACILITY_ID = B.FACILITY_ID JOIN HOURLY_USAGE H ON H.HH = E.HH AND E.FACILITY_ID = H.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN TAX_PRICE T ON E.HH = T.HH AND E.FACILITY_ID = T.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN ELFD_PRICE F ON E.HH = F.HH AND E.FACILITY_ID = F.FACILITY_ID JOIN RDIPROCSINFO_TB R ON E.FACILITY_ID = R.PROCS_ID
GROUP BY ROLLUP((E.FACILITY_ID, R.PROCS_NM))

WITH FACILITY_TAGS AS ( SELECT '취수장' AS FACILITY_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_ACTI' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '취수장', 'COM_EHV101_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_3_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_3_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201A_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201B_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_EMCC201_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전처리', 'COM_HV403_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전처리', 'COM_HV406_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RO', 'COM_HV402_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RO', 'COM_HV402_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '원수저류조', 'COM_MCC701H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601A_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601B_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601C_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601D_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_EMCC601_ACTI' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM FACILITY_TAGS F INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON F.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), LATEST_VAL AS ( SELECT TAGSN, VAL FROM ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY R.TAGSN ORDER BY R.LOG_TIME DESC) AS RN FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME LIKE #{date} || '%' ) WHERE RN = 1 ) SELECT T.FACILITY_ID, ROUND(NVL(SUM(L.VAL), 0), 2) AS REAL_TIME_POWER FROM TAG_LIST T LEFT JOIN LATEST_VAL L ON T.TAGSN = L.TAGSN GROUP BY T.FACILITY_ID

WITH FACILITY_TAGS AS ( SELECT '취수장' AS FACILITY_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_ACTI' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '취수장', 'COM_EHV101_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_3_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_3_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201A_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201B_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_EMCC201_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전처리', 'COM_HV403_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전처리', 'COM_HV406_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RO', 'COM_HV402_1_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RO', 'COM_HV402_2_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '원수저류조', 'COM_MCC701H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601A_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601B_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601C_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601D_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601H_ACTI' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_EMCC601_ACTI' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM FACILITY_TAGS F INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON F.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), MINUTE_SUM AS ( SELECT T.FACILITY_ID, R.LOG_TIME, SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 9, 2) AS HH, SUM(R.VAL) AS TOTAL_POWER FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME LIKE #{date} || '%' GROUP BY T.FACILITY_ID, R.LOG_TIME ), MAX_POWER AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HH AS MAX_HOUR, TOTAL_POWER AS MAX_POWER, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY FACILITY_ID ORDER BY TOTAL_POWER DESC) AS RN FROM MINUTE_SUM ) SELECT FACILITY_ID, MAX_HOUR, ROUND(MAX_POWER, 2) AS MAX_POWER FROM MAX_POWER WHERE RN = 1

WITH FACILITY_TAGS AS ( SELECT '취수장' AS FACILITY_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_AE' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '취수장', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_EMCC201_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전처리', 'COM_HV403_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전처리', 'COM_HV406_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RO', 'COM_HV402_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RO', 'COM_HV402_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '원수저류조', 'COM_MCC701H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601C_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601D_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_EMCC601_AE' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM FACILITY_TAGS F INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON F.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL - 1, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24')) + 1 ), HOURLY_DATA AS ( SELECT T.FACILITY_ID, #{date} || HR.HH AS HOUR_KEY, HR.HH, SUM(R.VAL) AS HOUR_VAL FROM TAG_LIST T CROSS JOIN HOUR_RANGE HR LEFT JOIN RDR01MI_TB R ON T.TAGSN = R.TAGSN AND R.LOG_TIME = #{date} || HR.HH || '00' GROUP BY T.FACILITY_ID, HR.HH ),
HOURLY_USAGE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - NVL(LAG(HOUR_VAL, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY FACILITY_ID ORDER BY HOUR_KEY), 0) AS HOUR_USAGE FROM HOURLY_DATA ) SELECT FACILITY_ID, ROUND(SUM(GREATEST(HOUR_USAGE, 0)), 2) AS POWER_USAGE_MWH FROM HOURLY_USAGE WHERE HOUR_VAL IS NOT NULL AND HH > '00' GROUP BY FACILITY_ID

WITH FACILITY_TAGS AS ( SELECT '취수장' AS FACILITY_ID, 'COM_EHV101_1_AE' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '취수장', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV605_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_LV602_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_EMCC201_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전전처리', 'COM_MCC201H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전처리', 'COM_HV403_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '전처리', 'COM_HV406_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RO', 'COM_HV402_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RO', 'COM_HV402_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '원수저류조', 'COM_MCC701H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601C_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601D_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_MCC601H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '폐탈수처리', 'COM_EMCC601_AE' FROM DUAL ), TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM FACILITY_TAGS F INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON F.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL - 1, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24')) + 1 ), HOURLY_DATA AS ( SELECT T.FACILITY_ID, #{date} || HR.HH AS HOUR_KEY, HR.HH, SUM(R.VAL) AS HOUR_VAL FROM TAG_LIST T CROSS JOIN HOUR_RANGE HR LEFT JOIN RDR01MI_TB R ON T.TAGSN = R.TAGSN AND R.LOG_TIME = #{date} || HR.HH || '00' GROUP BY T.FACILITY_ID, HR.HH ),
HOURLY_USAGE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - NVL(LAG(HOUR_VAL, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY FACILITY_ID ORDER BY HOUR_KEY), 0) AS HOUR_USAGE FROM HOURLY_DATA ), UNIT_PRICE AS ( SELECT S.HH, P.APLCN_UNTPRC FROM ( SELECT CRTR_YR, APLCN_PTM_CD, HH, DATA_SE_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM RDIPWRERUNITMNG_TB WHERE CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) ) UNPIVOT( DATA_SE_CD FOR HH IN ( DATA_SE_CD_00 AS '00', DATA_SE_CD_01 AS '01', DATA_SE_CD_02 AS '02', DATA_SE_CD_03 AS '03', DATA_SE_CD_04 AS '04', DATA_SE_CD_05 AS '05', DATA_SE_CD_06 AS '06', DATA_SE_CD_07 AS '07', DATA_SE_CD_08 AS '08', DATA_SE_CD_09 AS '09', DATA_SE_CD_10 AS '10', DATA_SE_CD_11 AS '11', DATA_SE_CD_12 AS '12', DATA_SE_CD_13 AS '13', DATA_SE_CD_14 AS '14', DATA_SE_CD_15 AS '15', DATA_SE_CD_16 AS '16', DATA_SE_CD_17 AS '17', DATA_SE_CD_18 AS '18', DATA_SE_CD_19 AS '19', DATA_SE_CD_20 AS '20', DATA_SE_CD_21 AS '21', DATA_SE_CD_22 AS '22', DATA_SE_CD_23 AS '23' ) ) ) S LEFT JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON S.CRTR_YR = P.CRTR_YR AND S.APLCN_PTM_CD = P.APLCN_PTM_CD AND S.DATA_SE_CD = P.DATA_SE_CD AND P.DATA_CD = '1' WHERE S.APLCN_PTM_CD = #{season} ),
BASIC_PRICE AS ( --기본요금 SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 7 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END), 0) /6 AS PRICE FROM RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB A WHERE CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) AND APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' ), SUB_BASIC_PRICE AS( --예비 기본요금 SELECT PRICE * 0.02 AS PRICE FROM BASIC_PRICE ), CLMT_PRICE AS ( --기후환경요금 SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 3 ), FLAD_PRICE AS ( --연료비조정액 SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 4 ), LODF_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.HH, ( CASE WHEN H.HOUR_USAGE > 0 THEN H.HOUR_USAGE * 1000 * NVL(U.APLCN_UNTPRC, 100) ELSE 0 END ) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN UNIT_PRICE U ON H.HH = U.HH WHERE H.HOUR_KEY > #{date} || '00' ),
ELTL_PRICE AS ( --전기요금계 SELECT A.FACILITY_ID, A.HH, NVL(A.PRICE, 0) + NVL(B.PRICE, 0) + NVL(C.PRICE, 0) + NVL(D.PRICE, 0) + NVL(E.PRICE, 0) AS PRICE FROM LODF_PRICE A CROSS JOIN BASIC_PRICE B CROSS JOIN SUB_BASIC_PRICE C LEFT JOIN CLMT_PRICE D ON A.HH = D.HH AND A.FACILITY_ID = D.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN FLAD_PRICE E ON A.HH = E.HH AND A.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID ),
TAX_PRICE AS( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HH, PRICE * 0.1 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ),
ELFD_PRICE AS( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HH, PRICE * 0.027 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE )
SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, ROUND( SUM( NVL(E.PRICE, 0) + NVL(T.PRICE, 0) + NVL(F.PRICE, 0) ) , 0) AS POWER_COST, TO_CHAR(SUM( NVL(E.PRICE, 0) + NVL(T.PRICE, 0) + NVL(F.PRICE, 0) ), 'FM999,999,999,990.0000') AS REAL_COST FROM ELTL_PRICE E
JOIN HOURLY_USAGE H ON H.HH = E.HH AND H.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID
LEFT JOIN TAX_PRICE T ON E.HH = T.HH AND E.FACILITY_ID = T.FACILITY_ID
LEFT JOIN ELFD_PRICE F ON E.HH = F.HH AND E.FACILITY_ID = F.FACILITY_ID
GROUP BY H.FACILITY_ID

SELECT T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM, T.TAG_ALIAS, T.TAG_ADD_DC, R.LOG_TIME, ROUND(R.VAL, 2) AS VAL FROM RDITAG_TB T LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TAGSN, LOG_TIME, VAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TAGSN ORDER BY LOG_TIME DESC) AS RN FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE LOG_TIME LIKE #{date} || '%' ) R ON T.TAGSN = R.TAGSN AND R.RN = 1 WHERE T.TAG_NM = #{tagNm} AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y'

WITH TAG_INFO AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = #{tagNm} AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ) SELECT SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 10) AS HOUR_KEY, ROUND(R.VAL, 2) AS VAL FROM ( SELECT LOG_TIME, TAGSN, VAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 10) ORDER BY LOG_TIME DESC) AS RN FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_INFO) AND LOG_TIME LIKE #{date} || '%' ) R WHERE R.RN = 1 ORDER BY R.LOG_TIME

WITH TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), DATE_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD') - LEVEL + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATA_DT FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 30 ), DAILY_DATA AS ( SELECT R.DAY_KEY, SUM(R.MAX_VAL - R.MIN_VAL) AS DAILY_USAGE FROM ( SELECT TAGSN, SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) AS DAY_KEY, MAX(VAL) AS MAX_VAL, MIN(VAL) AS MIN_VAL FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) IN (SELECT DATA_DT FROM DATE_RANGE) GROUP BY TAGSN, SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) ) R GROUP BY R.DAY_KEY ) SELECT D.DATA_DT AS DATE_KEY, NVL(DD.DAILY_USAGE, 0) AS USAGE_KWH, ROUND(NVL(DD.DAILY_USAGE, 0), 4) AS USAGE_MWH FROM DATE_RANGE D LEFT JOIN DAILY_DATA DD ON D.DATA_DT = DD.DAY_KEY ORDER BY D.DATA_DT

WITH TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), MONTH_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD'), - LEVEL + 1), 'YYYYMM') AS MONTH_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ), MONTHLY_DATA AS ( SELECT R.MONTH_KEY, SUM(R.MAX_VAL - R.MIN_VAL) AS MONTHLY_USAGE FROM ( SELECT TAGSN, SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6) AS MONTH_KEY, MAX(VAL) AS MAX_VAL, MIN(VAL) AS MIN_VAL FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6) IN (SELECT MONTH_KEY FROM MONTH_RANGE) GROUP BY TAGSN, SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6) ) R GROUP BY R.MONTH_KEY ) SELECT M.MONTH_KEY, NVL(MD.MONTHLY_USAGE, 0) AS USAGE_KWH, ROUND(NVL(MD.MONTHLY_USAGE, 0), 4) AS USAGE_MWH FROM MONTH_RANGE M LEFT JOIN MONTHLY_DATA MD ON M.MONTH_KEY = MD.MONTH_KEY ORDER BY M.MONTH_KEY

WITH TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), YEAR_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD'), - (LEVEL - 1) * 12), 'YYYY') AS YEAR_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 5 ), YEARLY_DATA AS ( SELECT R.YEAR_KEY, SUM(R.MAX_VAL - R.MIN_VAL) AS YEARLY_USAGE FROM ( SELECT TAGSN, SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4) AS YEAR_KEY, MAX(VAL) AS MAX_VAL, MIN(VAL) AS MIN_VAL FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_LIST) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4) IN (SELECT YEAR_KEY FROM YEAR_RANGE) GROUP BY TAGSN, SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4) ) R GROUP BY R.YEAR_KEY ) SELECT Y.YEAR_KEY, NVL(YD.YEARLY_USAGE, 0) AS USAGE_KWH, ROUND(NVL(YD.YEARLY_USAGE, 0), 4) AS USAGE_MWH FROM YEAR_RANGE Y LEFT JOIN YEARLY_DATA YD ON Y.YEAR_KEY = YD.YEAR_KEY ORDER BY Y.YEAR_KEY
mapper.sql: FACILITY_TAGS AS ( SELECT '' AS FACILITY_ID, '' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_AE' FROM DUAL )
FACILITY_TAGS AS ( SELECT '' AS FACILITY_ID, '' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_1', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE' FROM DUAL )

FACILITY_TAGS AS ( SELECT '' AS FACILITY_ID, '' AS TAG_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_2', 'COM_MCC701H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV605_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_LV602_3_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_EMCC201_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_3', 'COM_MCC201H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV403_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_4', 'COM_HV406_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_1_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_5', 'COM_HV402_2_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601A_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601B_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601C_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601D_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_MCC601H_AE' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PROCS_7', 'COM_EMCC601_AE' FROM DUAL )
mapper.select:
WITH
, TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM FACILITY_TAGS F INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON F.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL - 1, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24')) + 1 ), HOURLY_DATA AS ( SELECT T.FACILITY_ID, #{date} || HR.HH AS HOUR_KEY, HR.HH, SUM(NVL(R.VAL, 0)) AS HOUR_VAL FROM TAG_LIST T CROSS JOIN HOUR_RANGE HR LEFT JOIN RDF01HH_TB R ON T.TAGSN = R.TAGSN AND R.LOG_TIME = #{date} || HR.HH GROUP BY T.FACILITY_ID, HR.HH ), HOURLY_USAGE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, CASE WHEN HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE <= 0 OR (NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE) <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE (NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE) * 1000 END AS HOUR_USAGE FROM ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, LAG(HOUR_VAL) OVER (PARTITION BY FACILITY_ID ORDER BY HOUR_KEY) AS HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE FROM HOURLY_DATA ) ), UNIT_PRICE AS ( SELECT S.HH, P.APLCN_UNTPRC FROM ( SELECT CRTR_YR, APLCN_PTM_CD, HH, DATA_SE_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM RDIPWRERUNITMNG_TB WHERE CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) ) UNPIVOT ( DATA_SE_CD FOR HH IN ( DATA_SE_CD_00 AS '01', DATA_SE_CD_01 AS '02', DATA_SE_CD_02 AS '03', DATA_SE_CD_03 AS '04', DATA_SE_CD_04 AS '05', DATA_SE_CD_05 AS '06', DATA_SE_CD_06 AS '07', DATA_SE_CD_07 AS '08', DATA_SE_CD_08 AS '09', DATA_SE_CD_09 AS '10', DATA_SE_CD_10 AS '11', DATA_SE_CD_11 AS '12', DATA_SE_CD_12 AS '13', DATA_SE_CD_13 AS '14', DATA_SE_CD_14 AS '15', DATA_SE_CD_15 AS '16', DATA_SE_CD_16 AS '17', DATA_SE_CD_17 AS '18', DATA_SE_CD_18 AS '19', DATA_SE_CD_19 AS '20', DATA_SE_CD_20 AS '21', DATA_SE_CD_21 AS '22', DATA_SE_CD_22 AS '23', DATA_SE_CD_23 AS '24' ) ) ) S LEFT JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON S.CRTR_YR = P.CRTR_YR AND S.APLCN_PTM_CD = P.APLCN_PTM_CD AND S.DATA_SE_CD = P.DATA_SE_CD AND P.DATA_CD = '1' WHERE S.APLCN_PTM_CD = #{season} ), BASIC_PRICE AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, ( CASE WHEN F.FACILITY_ID = 'PROCS_1' THEN MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 1 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) ELSE MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 2 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) END * MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 3 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) * 12 / 365 / 24 / 6 ) AS PRICE FROM RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB A CROSS JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT FACILITY_ID FROM FACILITY_TAGS ) F WHERE A.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) AND A.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' GROUP BY F.FACILITY_ID ), SUB_BASIC_PRICE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, PRICE * 0.02 AS PRICE FROM BASIC_PRICE ), CLMT_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 4 ), FLAD_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(#{date}, 1, 4) AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 5 ), LODF_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.HH, CASE WHEN H.HOUR_USAGE > 0 THEN H.HOUR_USAGE * NVL(U.APLCN_UNTPRC, 100) ELSE 0 END AS PRICE, H.HOUR_USAGE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN UNIT_PRICE U ON H.HH = U.HH --WHERE H.HH != '01' ), ELTL_PRICE AS ( SELECT A.FACILITY_ID, A.HH, NVL(A.PRICE, 0) + NVL(B.PRICE, 0) + NVL(C.PRICE, 0) + NVL(D.PRICE, 0) + NVL(E.PRICE, 0) AS PRICE FROM LODF_PRICE A JOIN BASIC_PRICE B ON A.FACILITY_ID = B.FACILITY_ID JOIN SUB_BASIC_PRICE C ON A.FACILITY_ID = C.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN CLMT_PRICE D ON A.HH = D.HH AND A.FACILITY_ID = D.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN FLAD_PRICE E ON A.HH = E.HH AND A.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID ), TAX_PRICE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HH, PRICE * 0.1 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ), ELFD_PRICE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, HH, PRICE * 0.027 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ), HOURLY_COST AS ( SELECT H.HOUR_KEY, H.HH, SUM(NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0)) AS HOUR_USAGE, SUM( NVL(E.PRICE, 0) + NVL(T.PRICE, 0) + NVL(F.PRICE, 0) ) AS HOUR_COST FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN ELTL_PRICE E ON H.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID AND H.HH = E.HH LEFT JOIN TAX_PRICE T ON E.FACILITY_ID = T.FACILITY_ID AND E.HH = T.HH LEFT JOIN ELFD_PRICE F ON E.FACILITY_ID = F.FACILITY_ID AND E.HH = F.HH GROUP BY H.HOUR_KEY, H.HH ) SELECT HOUR_KEY, NVL(HOUR_USAGE, 0)/1000 AS HOUR_USAGE, NVL(ROUND(HOUR_COST, 0), 0) AS HOUR_COST, NVL( ROUND( SUM(HOUR_USAGE) OVER ( ORDER BY HH ), 0 ), 0 )/1000 AS ACC_USAGE, NVL( ROUND( SUM(HOUR_COST) OVER ( ORDER BY HH ), 0 ), 0 ) AS ACC_COST FROM HOURLY_COST ORDER BY HH;

WITH
, TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM FACILITY_TAGS F INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON F.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), DATE_RANGE_CALC AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (LEVEL - 1), 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 31 ), DATE_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (LEVEL - 1), 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 30 ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 ), HOURLY_DATA AS ( SELECT T.FACILITY_ID, D.DT, D.DT || HR.HH AS HOUR_KEY, HR.HH, SUM(NVL(R.VAL, 0)) AS HOUR_VAL FROM TAG_LIST T CROSS JOIN DATE_RANGE_CALC D CROSS JOIN HOUR_RANGE HR LEFT JOIN RDF01HH_TB R ON T.TAGSN = R.TAGSN AND R.LOG_TIME = D.DT || HR.HH GROUP BY T.FACILITY_ID, D.DT, HR.HH ), HOURLY_USAGE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, CASE WHEN HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE <= 0 OR (NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE) <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE (NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE) * 1000 END AS HOUR_USAGE FROM ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, LAG(HOUR_VAL) OVER (PARTITION BY FACILITY_ID ORDER BY HOUR_KEY) AS HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE FROM HOURLY_DATA ) ), UNIT_PRICE AS ( SELECT S.HH, P.APLCN_UNTPRC FROM ( SELECT CRTR_YR, APLCN_PTM_CD, HH, DATA_SE_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM RDIPWRERUNITMNG_TB WHERE CRTR_YR = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') ) UNPIVOT ( DATA_SE_CD FOR HH IN ( DATA_SE_CD_00 AS '01', DATA_SE_CD_01 AS '02', DATA_SE_CD_02 AS '03', DATA_SE_CD_03 AS '04', DATA_SE_CD_04 AS '05', DATA_SE_CD_05 AS '06', DATA_SE_CD_06 AS '07', DATA_SE_CD_07 AS '08', DATA_SE_CD_08 AS '09', DATA_SE_CD_09 AS '10', DATA_SE_CD_10 AS '11', DATA_SE_CD_11 AS '12', DATA_SE_CD_12 AS '13', DATA_SE_CD_13 AS '14', DATA_SE_CD_14 AS '15', DATA_SE_CD_15 AS '16', DATA_SE_CD_16 AS '17', DATA_SE_CD_17 AS '18', DATA_SE_CD_18 AS '19', DATA_SE_CD_19 AS '20', DATA_SE_CD_20 AS '21', DATA_SE_CD_21 AS '22', DATA_SE_CD_22 AS '23', DATA_SE_CD_23 AS '24' ) ) ) S LEFT JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON S.CRTR_YR = P.CRTR_YR AND S.APLCN_PTM_CD = P.APLCN_PTM_CD AND S.DATA_SE_CD = P.DATA_SE_CD AND P.DATA_CD = '1' WHERE S.APLCN_PTM_CD = #{season} ), BASIC_PRICE AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, ( CASE WHEN F.FACILITY_ID = 'PROCS_1' THEN MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 1 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) ELSE MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 2 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) END * MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 3 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) * 12 / 365 / 24 / 6 ) AS PRICE FROM RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB A CROSS JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT FACILITY_ID FROM FACILITY_TAGS ) F WHERE A.CRTR_YR = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND A.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' GROUP BY F.FACILITY_ID ), SUB_BASIC_PRICE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, PRICE * 0.02 AS PRICE FROM BASIC_PRICE ), CLMT_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.DT, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 4 ), FLAD_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.DT, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 5 ), LODF_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.DT, H.HH, CASE WHEN H.HOUR_USAGE > 0 THEN H.HOUR_USAGE * NVL(U.APLCN_UNTPRC, 100) ELSE 0 END AS PRICE, H.HOUR_USAGE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN UNIT_PRICE U ON H.HH = U.HH --WHERE H.HH != '01' ), ELTL_PRICE AS ( SELECT A.FACILITY_ID, A.DT, A.HH, NVL(A.PRICE, 0) + NVL(B.PRICE, 0) + NVL(C.PRICE, 0) + NVL(D.PRICE, 0) + NVL(E.PRICE, 0) AS PRICE FROM LODF_PRICE A JOIN BASIC_PRICE B ON A.FACILITY_ID = B.FACILITY_ID JOIN SUB_BASIC_PRICE C ON A.FACILITY_ID = C.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN CLMT_PRICE D ON A.HH = D.HH AND A.DT = D.DT AND A.FACILITY_ID = D.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN FLAD_PRICE E ON A.HH = E.HH AND A.DT = E.DT AND A.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID ), TAX_PRICE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, HH, PRICE * 0.1 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ), ELFD_PRICE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, HH, PRICE * 0.027 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ), DAILY_COST AS ( SELECT H.DT, SUM(NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0)) AS DAILY_USAGE, SUM( NVL(E.PRICE, 0) + NVL(T.PRICE, 0) + NVL(F.PRICE, 0) ) AS DAILY_COST FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN ELTL_PRICE E ON H.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID AND H.DT = E.DT AND H.HH = E.HH LEFT JOIN TAX_PRICE T ON E.FACILITY_ID = T.FACILITY_ID AND E.DT = T.DT AND E.HH = T.HH LEFT JOIN ELFD_PRICE F ON E.FACILITY_ID = F.FACILITY_ID AND E.DT = F.DT AND E.HH = F.HH WHERE H.DT IN ( SELECT DT FROM DATE_RANGE ) GROUP BY H.DT ) SELECT D.DT AS DATE_KEY, NVL(DC.DAILY_USAGE, 0)/1000 AS DAILY_USAGE, NVL(ROUND(DC.DAILY_COST, 0), 0) AS DAILY_COST, NVL( ROUND( SUM(DC.DAILY_COST) OVER ( ORDER BY D.DT ), 0 ), 0 ) AS ACC_COST FROM DATE_RANGE D LEFT JOIN DAILY_COST DC ON D.DT = DC.DT ORDER BY D.DT;

WITH
, TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM FACILITY_TAGS F INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON F.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), MONTH_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -(LEVEL - 1)), 'YYYYMM') AS MONTH_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ), DATE_RANGE_CALC AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -11) - 1 + LEVEL - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -11) - 1 + LEVEL - 1, 'YYYYMM') AS MONTH_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -11) - 1 + LEVEL - 1 <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 ), DATE_HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT D.DT, D.MONTH_KEY, H.HH FROM DATE_RANGE_CALC D CROSS JOIN HOUR_RANGE H WHERE D.DT < TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 'YYYYMMDD') OR TO_NUMBER(H.HH) <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24')) ), HOURLY_DATA AS ( SELECT T.FACILITY_ID, DH.DT, DH.MONTH_KEY, DH.DT || DH.HH AS HOUR_KEY, DH.HH, SUM(NVL(R.VAL, 0)) AS HOUR_VAL FROM TAG_LIST T CROSS JOIN DATE_HOUR_RANGE DH LEFT JOIN RDF01HH_TB R ON T.TAGSN = R.TAGSN AND R.LOG_TIME = DH.DT || DH.HH GROUP BY T.FACILITY_ID, DH.DT, DH.MONTH_KEY, DH.HH ), HOURLY_USAGE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, MONTH_KEY, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, CASE WHEN HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE <= 0 OR (NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE) <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE (NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE) * 1000 END AS HOUR_USAGE FROM ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, MONTH_KEY, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, LAG(HOUR_VAL) OVER (PARTITION BY FACILITY_ID ORDER BY HOUR_KEY) AS HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE FROM HOURLY_DATA ) ), UNIT_PRICE AS ( SELECT S.CRTR_YR, S.HH, P.APLCN_UNTPRC FROM ( SELECT CRTR_YR, APLCN_PTM_CD, HH, DATA_SE_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM RDIPWRERUNITMNG_TB WHERE CRTR_YR BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -11), 'YYYY') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') ) UNPIVOT ( DATA_SE_CD FOR HH IN ( DATA_SE_CD_00 AS '01', DATA_SE_CD_01 AS '02', DATA_SE_CD_02 AS '03', DATA_SE_CD_03 AS '04', DATA_SE_CD_04 AS '05', DATA_SE_CD_05 AS '06', DATA_SE_CD_06 AS '07', DATA_SE_CD_07 AS '08', DATA_SE_CD_08 AS '09', DATA_SE_CD_09 AS '10', DATA_SE_CD_10 AS '11', DATA_SE_CD_11 AS '12', DATA_SE_CD_12 AS '13', DATA_SE_CD_13 AS '14', DATA_SE_CD_14 AS '15', DATA_SE_CD_15 AS '16', DATA_SE_CD_16 AS '17', DATA_SE_CD_17 AS '18', DATA_SE_CD_18 AS '19', DATA_SE_CD_19 AS '20', DATA_SE_CD_20 AS '21', DATA_SE_CD_21 AS '22', DATA_SE_CD_22 AS '23', DATA_SE_CD_23 AS '24' ) ) ) S LEFT JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON S.CRTR_YR = P.CRTR_YR AND S.APLCN_PTM_CD = P.APLCN_PTM_CD AND S.DATA_SE_CD = P.DATA_SE_CD AND P.DATA_CD = '1' WHERE S.APLCN_PTM_CD = #{season} ), BASIC_PRICE AS ( SELECT A.CRTR_YR, F.FACILITY_ID, ( CASE WHEN F.FACILITY_ID = 'PROCS_1' THEN MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 1 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) ELSE MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 2 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) END * MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 3 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) * 12 / 365 / 24 / 6 ) AS PRICE FROM RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB A CROSS JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT FACILITY_ID FROM FACILITY_TAGS ) F WHERE A.CRTR_YR BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -11), 'YYYY') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND A.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' GROUP BY A.CRTR_YR, F.FACILITY_ID ), SUB_BASIC_PRICE AS ( SELECT CRTR_YR, FACILITY_ID, PRICE * 0.02 AS PRICE FROM BASIC_PRICE ), CLMT_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.DT, H.MONTH_KEY, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(H.DT, 1, 4) AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 4 ), FLAD_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.DT, H.MONTH_KEY, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = SUBSTR(H.DT, 1, 4) AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 5 ), LODF_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.DT, H.MONTH_KEY, H.HH, CASE WHEN H.HOUR_USAGE > 0 THEN H.HOUR_USAGE * NVL(U.APLCN_UNTPRC, 100) ELSE 0 END AS PRICE, H.HOUR_USAGE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN UNIT_PRICE U ON SUBSTR(H.DT, 1, 4) = U.CRTR_YR AND H.HH = U.HH --WHERE H.HH != '01' ), ELTL_PRICE AS ( SELECT A.FACILITY_ID, A.DT, A.MONTH_KEY, A.HH, NVL(A.PRICE, 0) + NVL(B.PRICE, 0) + NVL(C.PRICE, 0) + NVL(D.PRICE, 0) + NVL(E.PRICE, 0) AS PRICE FROM LODF_PRICE A JOIN BASIC_PRICE B ON A.FACILITY_ID = B.FACILITY_ID AND SUBSTR(A.DT, 1, 4) = B.CRTR_YR JOIN SUB_BASIC_PRICE C ON A.FACILITY_ID = C.FACILITY_ID AND SUBSTR(A.DT, 1, 4) = C.CRTR_YR LEFT JOIN CLMT_PRICE D ON A.HH = D.HH AND A.DT = D.DT AND A.FACILITY_ID = D.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN FLAD_PRICE E ON A.HH = E.HH AND A.DT = E.DT AND A.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID ), TAX_PRICE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, MONTH_KEY, HH, PRICE * 0.1 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ), ELFD_PRICE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, MONTH_KEY, HH, PRICE * 0.027 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ), MONTHLY_COST AS ( SELECT H.MONTH_KEY, SUM(NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0))/1000 AS MONTH_USAGE, SUM( NVL(E.PRICE, 0) + NVL(T.PRICE, 0) + NVL(F.PRICE, 0) ) AS MONTH_COST FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN ELTL_PRICE E ON H.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID AND H.DT = E.DT AND H.HH = E.HH LEFT JOIN TAX_PRICE T ON E.FACILITY_ID = T.FACILITY_ID AND E.DT = T.DT AND E.HH = T.HH LEFT JOIN ELFD_PRICE F ON E.FACILITY_ID = F.FACILITY_ID AND E.DT = F.DT AND E.HH = F.HH WHERE H.MONTH_KEY IN ( SELECT MONTH_KEY FROM MONTH_RANGE ) GROUP BY H.MONTH_KEY ) SELECT MR.MONTH_KEY AS MONTH_KEY, NVL(MC.MONTH_USAGE, 0) AS MONTH_USAGE, NVL(ROUND(MC.MONTH_COST, 0), 0) AS MONTH_COST, NVL( ROUND( SUM(MC.MONTH_COST) OVER ( ORDER BY MR.MONTH_KEY ), 0 ), 0 ) AS ACC_COST FROM MONTH_RANGE MR LEFT JOIN MONTHLY_COST MC ON MR.MONTH_KEY = MC.MONTH_KEY ORDER BY MR.MONTH_KEY;

WITH
, TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT F.FACILITY_ID, T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM FROM FACILITY_TAGS F INNER JOIN RDITAG_TB T ON F.TAG_NM = T.TAG_NM AND T.TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), YEAR_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), -12 * (LEVEL - 1)), 'YYYY') AS YEAR_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 5 ), DATE_RANGE_CALC AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), -48) - 1 + LEVEL - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), -48) - 1 + LEVEL - 1, 'YYYY') AS YEAR_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), -48) - 1 + LEVEL - 1 <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL - 1, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 ), DATE_HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT D.DT, D.YEAR_KEY, H.HH FROM DATE_RANGE_CALC D CROSS JOIN HOUR_RANGE H WHERE D.DT < TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 'YYYYMMDD') OR TO_NUMBER(H.HH) <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24')) ), HOURLY_DATA AS ( SELECT T.FACILITY_ID, DH.DT, DH.YEAR_KEY, DH.DT || DH.HH AS HOUR_KEY, DH.HH, SUM(NVL(R.VAL, 0)) AS HOUR_VAL FROM TAG_LIST T CROSS JOIN DATE_HOUR_RANGE DH LEFT JOIN RDF01HH_TB R ON T.TAGSN = R.TAGSN AND R.LOG_TIME = DH.DT || DH.HH GROUP BY T.FACILITY_ID, DH.DT, DH.YEAR_KEY, DH.HH ), HOURLY_USAGE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, YEAR_KEY, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, CASE WHEN HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE <= 0 OR (NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE) <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE (NVL(HOUR_VAL, 0) - HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE) * 1000 END AS HOUR_USAGE FROM ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, YEAR_KEY, HOUR_KEY, HH, HOUR_VAL, LAG(HOUR_VAL) OVER (PARTITION BY FACILITY_ID ORDER BY HOUR_KEY) AS HOUR_USAGE_BEFORE FROM HOURLY_DATA ) ), UNIT_PRICE AS ( SELECT S.CRTR_YR, S.HH, P.APLCN_UNTPRC FROM ( SELECT CRTR_YR, APLCN_PTM_CD, HH, DATA_SE_CD FROM ( SELECT * FROM RDIPWRERUNITMNG_TB WHERE CRTR_YR BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), -48), 'YYYY') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') ) UNPIVOT ( DATA_SE_CD FOR HH IN ( DATA_SE_CD_00 AS '01', DATA_SE_CD_01 AS '02', DATA_SE_CD_02 AS '03', DATA_SE_CD_03 AS '04', DATA_SE_CD_04 AS '05', DATA_SE_CD_05 AS '06', DATA_SE_CD_06 AS '07', DATA_SE_CD_07 AS '08', DATA_SE_CD_08 AS '09', DATA_SE_CD_09 AS '10', DATA_SE_CD_10 AS '11', DATA_SE_CD_11 AS '12', DATA_SE_CD_12 AS '13', DATA_SE_CD_13 AS '14', DATA_SE_CD_14 AS '15', DATA_SE_CD_15 AS '16', DATA_SE_CD_16 AS '17', DATA_SE_CD_17 AS '18', DATA_SE_CD_18 AS '19', DATA_SE_CD_19 AS '20', DATA_SE_CD_20 AS '21', DATA_SE_CD_21 AS '22', DATA_SE_CD_22 AS '23', DATA_SE_CD_23 AS '24' ) ) ) S LEFT JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON S.CRTR_YR = P.CRTR_YR AND S.APLCN_PTM_CD = P.APLCN_PTM_CD AND S.DATA_SE_CD = P.DATA_SE_CD AND P.DATA_CD = '1' WHERE S.APLCN_PTM_CD = #{season} ), BASIC_PRICE AS ( SELECT A.CRTR_YR, F.FACILITY_ID, ( CASE WHEN F.FACILITY_ID = 'PROCS_1' THEN MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 1 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) ELSE MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 2 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) END * MAX(CASE WHEN A.DATA_SE_CD = 3 THEN A.APLCN_UNTPRC END) * 12 / 365 / 24 / 6 ) AS PRICE FROM RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB A CROSS JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT FACILITY_ID FROM FACILITY_TAGS ) F WHERE A.CRTR_YR BETWEEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), -48), 'YYYY') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND A.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' GROUP BY A.CRTR_YR, F.FACILITY_ID ), SUB_BASIC_PRICE AS ( SELECT CRTR_YR, FACILITY_ID, PRICE * 0.02 AS PRICE FROM BASIC_PRICE ), CLMT_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.DT, H.YEAR_KEY, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = H.YEAR_KEY AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 4 ), FLAD_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.DT, H.YEAR_KEY, H.HH, NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0) * NVL(P.APLCN_UNTPRC, 0) AS PRICE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H JOIN RDIUNITPRCMNG_TB P ON P.CRTR_YR = H.YEAR_KEY AND P.APLCN_PTM_CD = 'I' AND P.DATA_SE_CD = 5 ), LODF_PRICE AS ( SELECT H.FACILITY_ID, H.DT, H.YEAR_KEY, H.HH, CASE WHEN H.HOUR_USAGE > 0 THEN H.HOUR_USAGE * NVL(U.APLCN_UNTPRC, 100) ELSE 0 END AS PRICE, H.HOUR_USAGE FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN UNIT_PRICE U ON H.YEAR_KEY = U.CRTR_YR AND H.HH = U.HH --WHERE H.HH != '01' ), ELTL_PRICE AS ( SELECT A.FACILITY_ID, A.DT, A.YEAR_KEY, A.HH, NVL(A.PRICE, 0) + NVL(B.PRICE, 0) + NVL(C.PRICE, 0) + NVL(D.PRICE, 0) + NVL(E.PRICE, 0) AS PRICE FROM LODF_PRICE A JOIN BASIC_PRICE B ON A.FACILITY_ID = B.FACILITY_ID AND A.YEAR_KEY = B.CRTR_YR JOIN SUB_BASIC_PRICE C ON A.FACILITY_ID = C.FACILITY_ID AND A.YEAR_KEY = C.CRTR_YR LEFT JOIN CLMT_PRICE D ON A.HH = D.HH AND A.DT = D.DT AND A.FACILITY_ID = D.FACILITY_ID LEFT JOIN FLAD_PRICE E ON A.HH = E.HH AND A.DT = E.DT AND A.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID ), TAX_PRICE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, YEAR_KEY, HH, PRICE * 0.1 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ), ELFD_PRICE AS ( SELECT FACILITY_ID, DT, YEAR_KEY, HH, PRICE * 0.027 AS PRICE FROM ELTL_PRICE ), YEARLY_COST AS ( SELECT H.YEAR_KEY, SUM(NVL(H.HOUR_USAGE, 0)) AS YEAR_USAGE, SUM( NVL(E.PRICE, 0) + NVL(T.PRICE, 0) + NVL(F.PRICE, 0) ) AS YEAR_COST FROM HOURLY_USAGE H LEFT JOIN ELTL_PRICE E ON H.FACILITY_ID = E.FACILITY_ID AND H.DT = E.DT AND H.HH = E.HH LEFT JOIN TAX_PRICE T ON E.FACILITY_ID = T.FACILITY_ID AND E.DT = T.DT AND E.HH = T.HH LEFT JOIN ELFD_PRICE F ON E.FACILITY_ID = F.FACILITY_ID AND E.DT = F.DT AND E.HH = F.HH WHERE H.YEAR_KEY IN ( SELECT YEAR_KEY FROM YEAR_RANGE ) GROUP BY H.YEAR_KEY ) SELECT YR.YEAR_KEY AS YEAR_KEY, NVL(YC.YEAR_USAGE, 0)/1000 AS YEAR_USAGE, NVL(ROUND(YC.YEAR_COST, 0), 0) AS YEAR_COST, NVL( ROUND( SUM(YC.YEAR_COST) OVER ( ORDER BY YR.YEAR_KEY ), 0 ), 0 ) AS ACC_COST FROM YEAR_RANGE YR LEFT JOIN YEARLY_COST YC ON YR.YEAR_KEY = YC.YEAR_KEY ORDER BY YR.YEAR_KEY;

WITH TAG_INFO AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = #{tagNm} AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), DATE_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD') - LEVEL + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DATA_DT FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 30 ), DAILY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) AS DAY_KEY, MAX(VAL) - MIN(VAL) AS DAILY_VAL FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_INFO) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) IN (SELECT DATA_DT FROM DATE_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) ) SELECT D.DATA_DT AS DATE_KEY, ROUND(NVL(DD.DAILY_VAL, 0), 2) AS VAL FROM DATE_RANGE D LEFT JOIN DAILY_DATA DD ON D.DATA_DT = DD.DAY_KEY ORDER BY D.DATA_DT

WITH TAG_INFO AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = #{tagNm} AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), MONTH_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD'), - LEVEL + 1), 'YYYYMM') AS MONTH_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ), MONTHLY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6) AS MONTH_KEY, MAX(VAL) - MIN(VAL) AS MONTHLY_VAL FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_INFO) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6) IN (SELECT MONTH_KEY FROM MONTH_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6) ) SELECT M.MONTH_KEY, ROUND(NVL(MD.MONTHLY_VAL, 0), 2) AS VAL FROM MONTH_RANGE M LEFT JOIN MONTHLY_DATA MD ON M.MONTH_KEY = MD.MONTH_KEY ORDER BY M.MONTH_KEY

WITH TAG_INFO AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = #{tagNm} AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), YEAR_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD'), - (LEVEL - 1) * 12), 'YYYY') AS YEAR_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 5 ), YEARLY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4) AS YEAR_KEY, MAX(VAL) - MIN(VAL) AS YEARLY_VAL FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM TAG_INFO) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4) IN (SELECT YEAR_KEY FROM YEAR_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4) ) SELECT Y.YEAR_KEY, ROUND(NVL(YD.YEARLY_VAL, 0), 2) AS VAL FROM YEAR_RANGE Y LEFT JOIN YEARLY_DATA YD ON Y.YEAR_KEY = YD.YEAR_KEY ORDER BY Y.YEAR_KEY
